content.en:
But after entering the seventh floor of the Ruins Stone Tower, they were completely desperate!

Practicing an Infinite Extreme Domain Technique, this is too difficult!

In the Xuanqi Realm, almost all of the powerhouses who mastered the Infinite Extreme Domain Technique were high-level immeasurable lifeforms in the fourth stage.

Even if it was a high-level immeasurable lifeform on the Infinite Blood List, less than ten of them had successfully cultivated the Immeasurable Extreme Domain Technique.

For example, the Great Ancestor of the Star Sea and the Great Ancestor of the Extreme Yang have practiced the Infinite Extreme Domain Technique, which is the name of the Xuanqi Realm, crushing other Great Ancestors of the same level.

However, it took them countless years to practice an Infinite Extreme Domain Technique.

It was almost impossible to cultivate an Infinite Extreme Domain Technique in just 30 million realms.

Whew!!

One by one, the Great Ancestors left from the seventh floor of the Ruined Stone Tower, and they had to use the forces behind them, otherwise it would be impossible for them to succeed alone.

......

In the blink of an eye, more than 800,000 years have passed.

Now.

Ye Tian practiced this sword dao immeasurable extreme domain technique with the help of a replica body, and he also scrapped the copy body many times, but in the end, he still practiced this kendo immeasurable extreme domain technique.

"Wuheng Sword!"

This is the name of this Kendo Immeasurable Extreme Domain Technique.

For Ye Tian, the power of the Infinite Constant Sword was okay, but when he broke through to the fourth stage, this Infinite Extreme Domain Technique would not be of much use.

On the contrary, if it is a truncated finger, the power will continue to increase, and even in the fourth stage, it will have a powerful boost.

"It's done!"

Ye Tian showed the Wuheng Sword he had cultivated to the Ruined Stone Tower, and was immediately recognized by the Ruined Stone Tower.

Airplanes!!!!

The Ruined Stone Tower immediately gave Ye Tian a benefit.

I saw a blood-red fruit appear on Ye Tian's hand, exuding a fragrance that shocked many great ancestors.

"The Seventh Strange Fruit of the Xuanqi Realm - Red Blood Immeasurable Fruit!"

The Great Ancestor of the Extreme Sun was all surprised.

The other Great Ancestors looked at it one after another, and they all showed greedy looks.

This is a treasure that is unimaginable in the entire Xuanqi Realm, it is a red-blooded immeasurable fruit, once swallowed, it can greatly enhance the potential of the physical body, and even increase the chance of breaking through to the fourth stage by thirty percent.

It is said that the Red Blood Immeasurable Fruit is useful even for the high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the fourth stage, and there is a certain chance of impacting the hope of the fifth stage, but it requires enough Red Blood Immeasurable Fruit, and just one is not very helpful.

But even so, a single Red Blood Immeasurable Fruit was enough to make a fourth-stage high-level Immeasurable Lifeform attack!

Ye Tian also recognized the Red Blood Immeasurable Fruit, and knew very well that there were many Great Ancestors who were eyeing the Red Blood Immeasurable Fruit, for some forces, this Red Blood Immeasurable Fruit was enough to create a fourth-stage high-level Immeasurable Life Form!

"I've attracted enough eyes, plus a Red Blood Immeasurable Fruit, I will definitely be besieged, just eat it!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he directly devoured this red-blooded immeasurable fruit in front of many great ancestors.

"Tyrannical creatures!"

Extreme Yang Great Ancestor secretly regretted.

If it was given to him, he would dare to attack the fourth stage now, and it would be a 100% breakthrough.

The Blood Ancestor is also a little sorry, it is a complete waste to eat such a good thing now!

After all, Ye Tian has only just broken through to the third stage not long ago, and there is still too much gap before he hits the fourth stage!

Rumble!!!

The Red Blood Immeasurable Fruit was refined by Ye Tian all the time, and the Immeasurable Bones of the whole body were absorbing the energy of the Red Blood Immeasurable Fruit.

At this time, Ye Tian found that the seed imprint of the Immeasurable Divine Power Technique inside his Infinite Bone was growing, relying on the energy of the Red Blood Immeasurable Fruit to rapidly evolve and improve.

"At this growth rate, even if I can't form a true immeasurable supernatural power, maybe I can use this power!" Ye Tian said darkly.

At that moment, a ray of light enveloped him, sending him to the eighth floor of the Ruined Stone Tower.

This was also the first time that he had taken the lead in entering a higher level ahead of other Great Ancestors, and this achievement alone was enough to make him famous in the entire Xuanqi Realm.

After Ye Tian left the seventh layer, this group of Great Ancestors began to discuss.

"This Great Ancestor is too demonic, how long has it been since he has practiced an Infinite Extreme Domain Technique?"

"It's incredible, this talent is terrifying!"

"Why wasn't it me who practiced the Infinite Extreme Domain Technique!"

And the Raccoon Blood Ancestor was also extremely surprised, he knew that Ye Tian was incomparably demonic, but he didn't expect that the demon would reach such an extent, completely crushing the Great Ancestor of the entire Xuanqi Realm!

"It's a pity that I can't pass the seventh floor, so I'll have to find a chance to slip away!"

The Blood Ancestor said secretly.

For him, the benefits he got from the Ruined Stone Tower this time were enough, and as for capturing the Ruined Stone Tower, he had no hope at all, so naturally he didn't have this idea.

......

The eighth floor of the Ruins Stone Tower.

When Ye Tian came here, he immediately received a message from the Ruins Stone Tower and learned about the situation on the eighth floor.

The eighth layer is a sea of blood, and what flows in this sea of blood is immeasurable blood, and it is pure immeasurable blood that has been extracted by the ruins stone tower, and it is immeasurable blood that can be absorbed and refined by high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

Of course, without the strength of the third stage of cultivation, you can't step into here at all, otherwise your physical body won't be able to withstand the power of immeasurable blood.

"This should be a long time, the immeasurable blood that flowed out of the battle in the Nine Shadows Blood Abyss or the Divine Armor Realm was absorbed by the Ruins Stone Tower and gathered here!"

Ye Tian muttered.

For him, this is a treasure land, which can drastically reduce the time it takes him to condense immeasurable blood.

However, the immeasurable blood in this treasure land seems to be a lot, but in fact it is not much, it is just a sea of blood transformed into immeasurable blood, strictly speaking, it is only a small amount of immeasurable blood.

There is no assessment in this level, only rewards, and immeasurable blood is a reward, without any absorption limit, how much can be absorbed.

If the previous Great Ancestor had absorbed and refined, then there would be no benefit to the latecomers.

I saw that Ye Tian directly submerged into the sea of blood and began to absorb the immeasurable blood of the sea of blood.

This kind of refined immeasurable blood is very easy to absorb, and it only contains immeasurable blood energy, without any imprints, so there is no problem with absorption.

Ye Tian quickly absorbed the immeasurable blood and then condensed his own immeasurable blood, drop after drop of immeasurable blood was condensed, and then began to refine the immeasurable blood, striving to improve the quality of the immeasurable blood.

It's just that using this immeasurable blood to quench one's own immeasurable blood and improve its quality is too slow.

So, Ye Tian took out some Void Golden Water to quench his immeasurable blood, so that the effect of the improvement was much faster.
